Name: EXAMPLE_EMAIL_FILEATTACHMENTS
Description:
EXAMPLE_EMAIL_FILEATTACHMENTS

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to send emails with attachments, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

Within the stored procedure Prescript_Example_SendEmailWithFileAttachments, the clr_SimpleEmail is employed to attach two files and dispatch an email.
Author: Josh
